name: example-open-design-homepage
title: Open Design Homepage

title_i18n.ja: Open Design ホームページ

description: A pixel-faithful mirror of the live open-design.ai homepage — an interactive WebGL/Three.js (React Three Fiber) hero built on Next.js. Features a real-time 3D "Open Design" wordmark (Draco-compressed geometry), a scattered sticker collage, custom variable fonts, cursor-reactive parallax, and scroll-driven motion. This is a first-party showcase of the visual ceiling Open Design targets for interactive marketing surfaces on the web — fully self-contained, zero external dependencies, renders in the sandboxed preview. Use as a reference for high-craft 3D landing pages, agent-native product sites, and motion-rich hero sections.

description_i18n.en: A pixel-faithful mirror of the live open-design.ai homepage — an interactive WebGL/Three.js (React Three Fiber) hero built on Next.js. Features a real-time 3D "Open Design" wordmark (Draco-compressed geometry), a scattered sticker collage, custom variable fonts, cursor-reactive parallax, and scroll-driven motion. This is a first-party showcase of the visual ceiling Open Design targets for interactive marketing surfaces on the web — fully self-contained, zero external dependencies, renders in the sandboxed preview. Use as a reference for high-craft 3D landing pages, agent-native product sites, and motion-rich hero sections.
description_i18n.zh-CN: open-design.ai 官网主页的像素级镜像——基于 Next.js 的交互式 WebGL/Three.js(React Three Fiber)首屏。含实时 3D「Open Design」立体字(Draco 压缩几何)、散落贴纸拼贴、可变字体、光标视差和滚动驱动动效。这是 Open Design 面向 Web 交互营销页所追求的视觉天花板的官方范例——完全自包含、零外部依赖、可在沙箱预览中渲染。适合作为高工艺 3D 落地页、agent 原生产品站、动效丰富首屏的参考。

query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：open-design.ai 官网主页的像素级镜像——基于 Next.js 的交互式 WebGL/Three.js(React Three Fiber)首屏。含实时 3D「Open Design」立体字(Draco 压缩几何)、散落贴纸拼贴、可变字体、光标视差和滚动驱动动效。这是 Open Design 面向 Web 交互营销页所追求的视觉天花板的官方范例——完全自包含、零外部依赖、可在沙箱预览中渲染。适合作为高工艺 3D 落地页、agent 原生产品站、动效丰富首屏的参考。
